title: New Years Eve Makeup
description: Create stunning New Years Eve looks in the New Years Eve Makeup game! Help three BFFs get party-ready with dazzling themes: Ellie’s cinnamon roll glam, Regina’s golden glow, and Kali’s icy gem look. Customize each girls makeup with eyeshadows, mascaras, lipsticks, and accessories, then complete their style with elegant dresses and chic hairstyles. Perfect for makeup and fashion enthusiasts, this game brings the ultimate NYE makeover experience. Celebrate in style and sparkle all night!
instructions: Use your mouse to play the game on a desktop tap to play on mobile devices
